title: "Atom dialog box style/font - Lubuntu 20.10"

### Post by johnspiral on 2020-11-06
Hi,

Loving Lubuntu 20.10 fast/stable and very lightweight! Perfect for old laptops.

Does anyone know how to adjust Atom's ([https://atom.io/](https://atom.io/)) dialog box style? 

sample to follow:

I've looked both at LXQt Appearance Configuration and Openbox settings. No joy.

Is there something here:

~/.config > tree lxqt/
lxqt/

### Post by johnspiral on 2020-11-06

### Post by johnspiral on 2020-11-06
forgot to say: Atom installed via snap.

Found a solution by passing environment variable GTK_THEME to atom via:

GTK_THEME=Arc-Dark atom

Now it's a lot easier to differentiate: 'Save' / 'Cancel' / 'Don't Save'.

---
